title: Trampoline+
body:
⚠️ Resource Pack required

Use /function trampoline/settings to customize the trampoline

# ‎ Translations ``` Беларуская — Belarus Čeština — Czech Republic Deutsch — Germany English — USA Español — Spain Español — Mexico Italiano — Italy 日本語 — Japan Қазақша — Kazakhstan 한국어 — South Korea Polski — Poland Português — Brazil Română — Romania Русский — Russia Українська — Ukraine 中文 — China ``` --- If you find any errors in the translations or have any other comments, please contact me on Telegram (@edhardyhunter) or Discord (imran#0872).
